summary: Exely Webhook API testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). POST /api/webhooks/exely/reservations correctly accepts OTA_HotelResNotifRQ SOAP XML and returns OTA_HotelResNotifRS. Webhook parses guest info, dates, room data from SOAP. Tenant resolution by hotel_code (501694) working. Cancellation handling with ResStatus=Cancel works. Error handling for empty body, invalid XML, unknown hotel_code all working correctly. Frontend /exely page shows webhook URL card with copy button when connected.

issues: Clipboard copy shows error in headless/automation context (expected security behavior) - works in real browser

critical_code_review_comments: Webhook router properly handles SOAP XML with defusedxml for security
Webhook is PUBLIC (no JWT auth) - validated by hotel_code in exely_connections
Auto-import triggers after webhook creates exely_reservation
OTA response format follows OTA 2003/05 standard
Frontend webhook URL card has proper data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Webhook URL card and copy button verified)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_WEBHOOK_* reservations created during backend testing (auto-cleaned via idempotency)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exely webhook endpoint at /api/webhooks/exely/reservations is PUBLIC and accepts SOAP XML (OTA_HotelResNotifRQ). Hotel code 501694 maps to tenant 044f122b-87b5-480a-88b4-b9534b0c8c90. Frontend route is /exely (not /exely-integration). Webhook URL card only shows when Exely connection is active.

GET /api/webhooks/exely/info.returns: JSON with webhook_url, method, content_type, supported_operations

tests_passed: Empty body returns SOAP error response
Invalid XML returns parse error response
Unknown hotel_code returns 404 error in SOAP
Valid SOAP creates reservation and returns Success
Parses guest name, dates, room info correctly
Tenant resolved by hotel_code in XML
